glosses.zh-Hans: 典型的; 有代表性的
glosses.yue: 典型嘅; 有代表性嘅
glosses.ja: 典型的な; 特徴的な

translations.yue: 呢個真係好莉娜嘅作風。
translations.pt: Isso é bem a cara da Lena.
translations.nl: Dat is echt iets voor Lena.
translations.hi: यह तो बिलकुल लीना जैसा है.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun (3rd person neuter singular) functioning as the clausal subject.
Finite present (3rd sg) form of the copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective; forms a fixed-like expression with the following proper name to mean ‘characteristic of ...’.
Proper noun serving as complement to the predicate adjective (‘typical Lena’).

sentences.target: Das Wetter ist typisch für April.

translations.de: Das Wetter ist typisch für April.
translations.en: The weather is typical for April.
translations.es: Este tiempo es muy típico de abril.
translations.it: Questo tempo è tipico di aprile.
translations.zh-Hans: 这就是典型的四月天气。
translations.yue: 呢個就係典型嘅四月天氣。
translations.pt: Este tempo é típico de abril.
translations.vi: Thời tiết này đúng kiểu tháng Tư.
translations.nl: Dit weer is typisch voor april.
translations.hi: यह मौसम अप्रैल के लिए सामान्य है.
translations.pl: Ta pogoda jest typowa dla kwietnia.
translations.el: Ο καιρός είναι τυπικός για τον Απρίλιο.
translations.id: Cuaca seperti ini khas bulan April.
translations.ro: Vremea asta este tipică pentru aprilie.
translations.cs: Tohle počasí je pro duben typické.
translations.ja: いかにも四月らしい天気だ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative singular neuter) determining ‘Wetter’.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite present (3rd sg) copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective describing ‘Wetter’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP specifying the reference class/time.
Proper noun; object of the preposition ‘für’ (accusative), denoting the month.

translations.es: Este pan tiene un sabor muy alemán.
translations.fr: Ce pain a un goût très allemand.
translations.it: Questo pane ha un sapore molto tedesco.
translations.ko: 이 빵은 정말 독일스러운 맛이 난다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这面包的味道很有德国风味。
translations.yue: 呢個麵包好有德國風味。
translations.ru: У этого хлеба типично немецкий вкус.
translations.pt: Este pão tem um sabor bem alemão.
translations.he: ללחם הזה יש טעם גרמני טיפוסי.
translations.vi: Ổ bánh này có hương vị rất Đức.
translations.uk: У цього хліба типовий німецький смак.
translations.hu: Ennek a kenyérnek tipikusan német az íze.
translations.hi: इस ब्रेड का स्वाद बहुत जर्मन है.
translations.pl: Ten chleb ma typowo niemiecki smak.
translations.el: Αυτό το ψωμί έχει τυπική γερμανική γεύση.
translations.id: Roti ini rasanya sangat khas Jerman.
translations.sv: Det här brödet smakar typiskt tyskt.
translations.ro: Pâinea asta are un gust tipic german.
translations.cs: Ten chléb má typicky německou chuť.
translations.da: Det her brød smager typisk tysk.
translations.fi: Tässä leivässä on tyypillinen saksalainen maku.
translations.ja: このパンはとてもドイツらしい味がする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative singular neuter) determining ‘Brot’.
Common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite present (3rd sg) lexical verb; takes a predicative/adverbial complement describing flavor.
Adverb modifying the following adjective in the collocation ‘typisch deutsch’.
Adjective used predicatively, characterizing the taste as (typically) German.

sentences.target: In meiner Familie ist das typisch.

translations.de: In meiner Familie ist das typisch.
translations.en: In my family, that is typical.
translations.es: En mi familia eso es muy típico.
translations.fr: Dans ma famille, c’est très courant.
translations.ru: В моей семье это обычное дело.
translations.pt: Na minha família isso é bem comum.
translations.vi: Trong gia đình tôi, chuyện đó là bình thường.
translations.nl: In mijn familie is dat heel normaal.
translations.uk: У нашій сім’ї це звична річ.
translations.hi: मेरे परिवार में यह आम बात है.
translations.pl: W mojej rodzinie to zupełnie normalne.
translations.el: Στην οικογένειά μου αυτό είναι συνηθισμένο.
translations.nb: I familien min er det helt vanlig.
translations.id: Di keluarga saya, itu hal yang biasa.
translations.sv: I min familj är det helt vanligt.
translations.ro: În familia mea, asta e ceva obișnuit.
translations.cs: V naší rodině je to běžné.
translations.da: I min familie er det helt normalt.
translations.fi: Meidän perheessä se on ihan tavallista.
translations.ja: うちの家族ではよくあることだ。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a fronted adverbial PP (locative/social context).
Possessive determiner (dative feminine singular) agreeing with ‘Familie’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘In’ forming the PP.
Finite present (3rd sg) copula.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject (‘that’).
Predicate adjective; describes the subject as typical in the given context.
